task.title: Tracing IPv4 and IPv6 listen attempts

context.p: The solisten utility traces all IPv4 and IPv6 listen attempts. It traces the attempts including which ultimately fail or the listening program that does not accept the connection. The utility traces functions that the kernel calls when a program wants to listen for TCP connections.

step.cmd: Enter the following command to start the tracing process that displays all listen TCP attempts:

info.codeblock: # /usr/share/bcc/tools/solisten PID COMM PROTO BACKLOG PORT ADDR 3643 nc TCPv4 1 4242 0.0.0.0 3659 nc TCPv6 1 4242 2001:db8:1::1 4221 redis-server TCPv6 128 6379 :: 4221 redis-server TCPv4 128 6379 0.0.0.0 ....

step.cmd: Press Ctrl+C to stop the tracing process.
